title: Password Box
description: A specialized input field designed for securely capturing user passwords. It incorporates essential features to enhance usability, accessibility, and security while maintaining a user-friendly interface. The component extends MXInputBaseValueComponent and MXLookComponent to provide comprehensive input functionality with visual styling options.

sections.title: Strength Validation
sections.description: This feature visually indicates the strength of the password.

sections.title: Clear Button
sections.description: You can use ax-clear-button decorator for adding clear button to password box.

sections.title: Read Only and Disable state
sections.description: You can pass a boolean to read only and disable property for active and deactivate them.

sections.title: Toggle Button
sections.description: You can pass a boolean to showToggleButton property for toggle show password button. If you do not pass it the default value is 'true'

sections.title: Auto Complete
sections.description: You can pass 'current-password' or 'new-password' or 'one-time-code' or 'off' values to auto complete property. If you do not pass it the default value is 'one-time-code'

props.name: value
props.description: The current password value. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: The placeholder text displayed in the input field. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute of the input field. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: The validation state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the password box is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the password box is readonly. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Sets the autocomplete behavior for the input field.

props.name: showToggleButton
props.description: A flag for showing or hiding password button.

props.name: classNames
props.description: Defines custom CSS classes to apply to the component.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Emitted when the password value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the component state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the value changes with additional context. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component gains focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onKeyDown
events.description: Emitted when a key is pressed down. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyUp
events.description: Emitted when a key is released. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyPress
events.description: Emitted when a key is pressed. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when a component option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Toggles the input type between 'password' and 'text' to show or hide the password.
 */
toggleType(): void

props.name: showProgress
props.description: Whether to show the password strength progress bar.

props.name: showLengthGraterThan8
props.description: Whether to show the length validation rule (minimum 8 characters).

props.name: showUseUpperCase
props.description: Whether to show the uppercase letter validation rule.

props.name: showUseLowerCase
props.description: Whether to show the lowercase letter validation rule.

props.name: showUseNumber
props.description: Whether to show the number validation rule.

props.name: showUseSpecialCharacter
props.description: Whether to show the special character validation rule.
